# Thiqa (ثقة)

> Thiqa is an Arabic-first SaaS platform for managing insurance agencies — clients, vehicles, policies, accounting, claims, accidents, SMS, and reporting in one workspace.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and value proposition.
- [Landing](/landing): Marketing landing page with features and screenshots.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Subscription plans (monthly/yearly) for insurance agencies.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions about Thiqa.
- [Contact](/contact): Sales and support contact form.
- [Register](/register): Create a new agent account (35-day free trial).
- [Login](/login): Sign in to the CRM.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of use.
